ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Cryptocurrency pair symbol (e.g., BTCEUR) */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume on the given date */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency on the given date */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES pairs ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_code" TEXT /* Code of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency (e.g., Bitcoin, Ethereum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was created */,
  "total_supply" TEXT /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiat currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the fiat currency (e.g., EUR, USD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the fiat currency (e.g., Euro, US Dollar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fiat currency */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the fiat currency was created */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the fiat currency is used */,
  "central_bank" TEXT /* Name of the central bank responsible for the fiat currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency pair */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency pair (e.g., BTCEUR) */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency in the pair */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiat currency in the pair */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency pair was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the cryptocurrency pair (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairs_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pairs_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Primary role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "roles" TEXT /* Additional roles for the user (comma-separated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_modifications" (
  "mod_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the modification */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the modification was made */,
  "old_data" TEXT /* JSON object of the old data before modification */,
  "new_data" TEXT /* JSON object of the new data after modification */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the modification */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the modification was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for the modification */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the modification (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mod_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_modifications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_modifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the external data source */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the external data source was added */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Last date the external data source was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the external data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data log entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being integrated */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was integrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the integration failed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the integration was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for the integration */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the integration process (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES external_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)
